ORDER EXTENDING ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION (TO MAR-02-2018)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE OWYANG, ALEXANDER OWYANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY. THOSE WHO HAVE NOT MADE AN APPEARANCE ARE DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE PLAINTIFF IS TO PROVIDE VERIFICATIONS FOR ALL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $420.90, PAYMENT TO BE MADE WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE OWYANG, ALEXANDER OWYANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY

No appearances. Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Plaintiff is to provide verifications for all discovery responses and produce all responsive documents within 10 days of notice of entry of order. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $420.90, payment to be made within 20 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
